vocab.meaning: ánh sáng siêu thực, thanh tao
vocab.example: The taj mahal at sunrise had an ethereal glow that made the entire marble structure seem to float in mid-air.

vocab.meaning: những cồn cát nhấp nhô, lượn sóng
vocab.example: Watching the shadows dance across the undulating sand dunes of the Sahara was a sight I will never forget.

vocab.meaning: những thung lũng xanh tươi tốt
vocab.example: The train ride through Switzerland offered glimpses of verdant valleys dotted with traditional wooden chalets.

vocab.meaning: vòm trời đầy sao (như một mái che)
vocab.example: Camping in the outback allowed us to sleep under a starlit canopy far away from any light pollution.

vocab.meaning: những vách đá dốc đứng, hiểm trở
vocab.example: The road winds dangerously along precipitous cliffs that drop hundreds of meters into the churning ocean below.

vocab.meaning: bề mặt phẳng lặng như gương
vocab.example: The lake was so still that its mirror-like surface perfectly captured the symmetry of the surrounding pines.

vocab.meaning: kiến trúc được trang trí công phu, lộng lẫy
vocab.example: I was mesmerized by the ornate architecture of the temples in Kyoto, with their intricate gold leaf details.

vocab.meaning: đường bờ biển ngập tràn ánh nắng
vocab.example: We spent the afternoon cruising along the sun-drenched coastline of the Amalfi Coast, admiring the colorful villages.

vocab.meaning: những đỉnh núi phủ một lớp tuyết mỏng
vocab.example: Even in mid-summer, the snow-dusted peaks of the Himalayas stood out sharply against the deep blue sky.

vocab.meaning: những rặng san hô rực rỡ sắc màu
vocab.example: Snorkeling in the Great Barrier Reef revealed a world of vibrant coral reefs teeming with exotic marine life.
